ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crypto_assets" (
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency asset */,
  "coin_name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the cryptocurrency */,
  "listed_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency was listed on the exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* The market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" REAL /* The circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* The total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "contract_address" TEXT /* The smart contract address for the cryptocurrency (if applicable) */,
  "blockchain" TEXT /* The blockchain on which the cryptocurrency operates */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the asset's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency asset */,
  "price" REAL /* Current market price of the asset */,
  "change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  "volume_24h" REAL /* Trading volume over the last 24 hours */,
  "open_interest" REAL /* Open interest in the market for the asset */,
  "oi_change_24h" REAL /* Percentage change in open interest over the last 24 hours */,
  "oi_share" REAL /* Share of open interest in the total market */,
  "oi_vol_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of open interest to trading volume */,
  "funding_rate" REAL /* Current funding rate */,
  "predicted_funding_rate" REAL /* Predicted funding rate for the next period */,
  "liq_24h" REAL /* Liquidity changes over the last 24 hours */,
  "data_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "high_24h" REAL /* The highest price in the last 24 hours */,
  "low_24h" REAL /* The lowest price in the last 24 hours */,
  "volume_change_24h" REAL /* The percentage change in trading volume over the last 24 hours */,
  "liquidity_score" REAL /* A score representing the liquidity of the asset */,
  "volatility" REAL /* A measure of the asset's price volatility */,
  "long_short_ratio" REAL /* The ratio of long to short positions in the market */,
  "open_price" REAL /* The opening price of the asset at the start of the 24-hour period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* The closing price of the asset at the end of the 24-hour period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES crypto_assets ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency asset */,
  "price" REAL /* Historical price of the asset */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the historical price entry */,
  "high" REAL /* The highest price during the historical period */,
  "low" REAL /* The lowest price during the historical period */,
  "open" REAL /* The opening price at the start of the historical period */,
  "close" REAL /* The closing price at the end of the historical period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES crypto_assets ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volume_history" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical volume entry */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency asset */,
  "volume" REAL /* Historical trading volume of the asset */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the historical volume entry */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* The percentage change in trading volume compared to the previous period */,
  "volume_type" TEXT /* The type of volume (e.g., spot, futures) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volume_history_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES crypto_assets ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_interest_history" (
  "oi_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical open interest entry */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency asset */,
  "open_interest" REAL /* Historical open interest in the market for the asset */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the historical open interest entry */,
  "oi_change" REAL /* The percentage change in open interest compared to the previous period */,
  "oi_type" TEXT /* The type of open interest (e.g., spot, futures) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oi_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_interest_history_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES crypto_assets ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_rate_history" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical funding rate entry */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency asset */,
  "funding_rate" REAL /* Historical funding rate for the asset */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the historical funding rate entry */,
  "predicted_funding_rate_change" REAL /* The predicted change in the funding rate for the next period */,
  "funding_rate_type" TEXT /* The type of funding rate (e.g., spot, futures) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_rate_history_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES crypto_assets ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user for additional contact information */,
  "address" TEXT /* The physical address of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, funding rate change) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of alerts (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* The preferred time of day for receiving alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency asset */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert triggered */,
  "trigger_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, pending) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES crypto_assets ("coin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency asset */,
  "start_balance" REAL /* Starting balance for the trading period */,
  "end_balance" REAL /* Ending balance for the trading period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trading period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trading period */,
  "trades_executed" INTEGER /* The number of trades executed during the trading period */,
  "average_trade_value" REAL /* The average value of each trade */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* The profit or loss incurred during the trading period */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* A score representing the overall performance of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_performance_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES crypto_assets ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the trend (e.g., price, volume, open interest) */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Specific metric within the category */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trend entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the trend data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* The confidence level of the trend data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_forum" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_time" TEXT /* Time when the post was made */,
  "post_status" TEXT /* The status of the post (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "parent_post_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent post if the post is a reply */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* The number of likes the post has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_forum_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_forum_parent_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_post_id") REFERENCES collaboration_forum ("post_id")
)
